name: Toasted Ravioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk and egg.
2. Place the breadcrumbs in a shallow bowl.
3. Dip each ravioli into the milk mixture and coat with breadcrumbs.
4. Heat the vegetable oil to 350 degrees in a Dutch oven.
5. Fry the ravioli, a few at a time, for 1 minute on each side or until golden brown.
6. Drain the fried ravioli on paper towels.
7. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
8. Serve immediately with warm pizza sauce.
